page_metadata.biotools__summary:
A bioinformatic tool for dynamic hot spot analysis in nucleic acid-protein interface with a case study.

Protein and nucleic acid interactions play a vital role in many biological processes such as DNA replication, repair and processing, as well as RNA processing and translocation.
